Mohammed Shami Dominates as Sai Sudharsan Smashes a Stunning Ton in SMAT

Dec 9, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Mohammed Shami Shines with Four-Wicket Haul in Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy

Mohammed Shami showcased his enduring class with a stunning four-wicket haul (4/30) in the Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy, reinforcing his credentials for a spot in India’s T20 setup.
